text.en-US: Novena to Our Lady of the Miraculous Medal
text.pt-BR: Novena a Nossa Senhora da Medalha Milagrosa

inline.en-US: O Mary, conceived without sin, pray for us who have recourse to thee. O Mary, conceived without sin, pray for us who have recourse to thee. O Mary, conceived without sin, pray for us who have recourse to thee.
inline.pt-BR: Ó Maria concebida sem pecado, rogai por nós que recorremos a Vós. Ó Maria concebida sem pecado, rogai por nós que recorremos a Vós. Ó Maria concebida sem pecado, rogai por nós que recorremos a Vós.
